Knowledge Base

Hermes Plugin

First-class integration with the Hermes agent framework.

Installation

hermes plugin install mnemosyne

Or add to hermes.yaml:

plugins:
- name: mnemosyne
  source: pip
  config:
    db_path: ./memory.db
    embedding_model: text-embedding-3-small
    auto_context: true
    context_injection:
      enabled: true
      max_memories: 5
      min_relevance: 0.7

Auto-Context Injection

When enabled, Mnemosyne automatically injects relevant memories into agent context:


flowchart LR
  U[User Input] -->|query| M[Mnemosyne]
  M -->|recall| C[Context Assembly]
  C -->|inject| A[Agent Prompt]
  A -->|respond| R[Response]
  R -->|remember| M

Plugin Hooks

Mnemosyne registers the following Hermes hooks:

HookTimingAction
pre_promptBefore LLM callInject relevant memories
post_responseAfter LLM callStore conversation
tool_callAfter tool executionStore tool results
shutdownAgent shutdownRun sleep consolidation

Tool Schema

Mnemosyne exposes these tools to agents:

{
"name": "remember",
"description": "Store information in long-term memory",
"parameters": {
  "content": { "type": "string", "description": "Information to store" },
  "tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
  "importance": { "type": "number", "minimum": 0, "maximum": 1 }
}
}

{
"name": "recall",
"description": "Retrieve relevant memories",
"parameters": {
  "query": { "type": "string" },
  "top_k": { "type": "integer", "default": 5 }
}
}

{
"name": "add_fact",
"description": "Store a structured fact",
"parameters": {
  "subject": { "type": "string" },
  "predicate": { "type": "string" },
  "object": { "type": "string" }
}
}

{
"name": "query_facts",
"description": "Query the knowledge graph",
"parameters": {
  "subject": { "type": "string" },
  "predicate": { "type": "string" }
}
}

Configuration Options

OptionDefaultDescription
auto_contexttrueInject memories into prompts
context_injection.max_memories5Memories per injection
context_injection.min_relevance0.7Minimum score to include
store_conversationstrueSave conversation history
store_tool_resultstrueSave tool outputs

Troubleshooting

Plugin not loading

hermes plugin list
# Verify mnemosyne appears

hermes plugin logs mnemosyne
# Check for errors

Context not injected

Verify auto_context is enabled and memories exist:

hermes config get plugins.mnemosyne.auto_context
hermes memory stats
Hermes Version

Requires Hermes v2.0 or higher. The plugin API changed significantly in v2 — older Hermes versions are not supported.
